message:
fix(runtime): Add pylist variant to all PyValue switch statements

- sequences.zig: Use ob_base.ob_size for correct PyList length
- bool_ops.zig: Add pylist truthiness check
- float_ops/builtins.zig: Add pylist and missing variants to bool
- type_builtins.zig: Add pylist and missing variants to bool
- type_name.zig: Add pylist type name mapping

This ensures CPython lists from eval() work correctly with runtime
functions that switch on PyValue variants.

files.patch:
@@ -376,6 +376,7 @@ pub fn toBoolValue(value: PyValue) bool {
         .string => |s| s.len > 0,
         .none => false,
         .list => |l| l.items.len > 0,
+        .pylist => |l| l.ob_base.ob_size > 0, // CPython list
         .tuple => |t| t.len > 0,
         .bytes => |b| b.data.len > 0,
         .bigint => |b| !b.isZero(),

@@ -50,11 +50,13 @@ pub fn boolBuiltinCallPyValue(first: PyValue) PythonError!bool {
         .string => |s| s.len > 0,
         .bytes => |b| b.data.len > 0,
         .list => |l| l.items.len > 0,
+        .pylist => |l| l.ob_base.ob_size > 0, // CPython list
         .tuple => |t| t.len > 0,
         .none => false,
         .bigint => |bi| !bi.isZero(),
         .complex => |c| c.real != 0.0 or c.imag != 0.0,
-        .ptr => true,
+        .ptr, .type_obj, .object => true,
+        .not_implemented => true,
     };
 }

@@ -69,11 +69,13 @@ pub fn boolBuiltinCallPyValue(t: PyValue) PythonError!bool {
         .string => |s| s.len > 0,
         .bytes => |b| b.data.len > 0,
         .list => |l| l.items.len > 0,
+        .pylist => |l| l.ob_base.ob_size > 0, // CPython list
         .tuple => |tup| tup.len > 0,
         .none => false,
         .bigint => |bi| !bi.isZero(),
         .complex => |c| c.real != 0.0 or c.imag != 0.0,
-        .ptr => true,
+        .ptr, .type_obj, .object => true,
+        .not_implemented => true,
     };
 }

@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@ pub fn pyTypeName(value: anytype) []const u8 {
             .none => "NoneType",
             .not_implemented => "NotImplementedType",
             .list => "list",
+            .pylist => "list", // CPython list also reports as "list"
             .tuple => "tuple",
             .bigint => "int",
             .complex => "complex",
